introduction: SYNOPSISHye-ryun, a screen playwright, literally runs into Jae-woo when they are involved in a car accident. She lets him stay at her place until his leg heals. As Jae-woo recovers, Hye-ryun places him on the road to stardom by making him a film actor. Their relationship grows and they develop vague but complex feelings for each other. A series of events mark their relationship, the conflict between Hye-ryun and Dae-jung, her boyfriend, Hye-ryun's ex-husband's suicide, the murder of Yong-jin, and the car accident of Hye-ryun's former friend who stole her husband. Jae-woo finally realizes that his obsessive love for Hye-ryun has actually made her unhappy, and leaves her. After his departure, Hye-ryun learns of the depth of his love and finally accepts him completely.故事情景作家惠云在车祸中遇到了一位名叫Jae-ho的年轻人，并将他留在家里，直到他的双腿被治愈。当熙熙完全康复时，他设立了一个电影演员的方式，让他明白。随着时间的流逝，两者之间微妙而复杂的情感流动。惠伦与情人之间的冲突，前夫的自杀，李总统的谋杀，以及前夫的意外，都是相继发生的。对惠伦的热爱已成为人生的唯一目的，其后才知道自己的悲伤和病态使她感到痛苦。在Jae - woo离开后，Hye - ryun感觉Jae Woo的爱并且完全接受他。
